title: VideoCategory
description: A videoCategory resource identifies a category that has been or could be associated with uploaded videos.

kind.description: Identifies the API resource's type. Value is youtube#videoCategory.

id.description: The ID that YouTube uses to uniquely identify the video category.

snippet.description: The snippet object contains basic details about the video category.

channelId.description: The YouTube channel that created the video category.

assignable.description: Indicates whether videos can be associated with the category.
